home.title: Book a viewing slot by date and 2-hour time blocks
home.summary: Each slot confirms up to 2 people. Extra bookings go to the waitlist. Students get higher priority.
home.name: Name

rules.title: Booking rules
rules.slotRuleDesc: The day is split into 12 two-hour slots. Each slot confirms up to 2 people; extras join the waitlist.
rules.priorityRuleDesc: Students are prioritized over non-students; same priority is sorted by submission time.
rules.bookingRuleDesc: Enter a date, name, student status, and select one or more slots from the home page.
rules.stepOneDesc: Pick the date you want, then select one or more time slots.
rules.stepTwoTitle: Fill in your name and submit
rules.stepTwoDesc: Enter your real name and mark whether you are a student.
rules.stepThreeDesc: Students get priority, and overflow bookings go to the waitlist.
